/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o -o main   -L/home/deathstar/libraries/RTIMULib2/RTIMULib/build  -L/home/deathstar/deathstar/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/deathstar/libraries/RTIMULib2/RTIMULib/build:/home/deathstar/deathstar/lib:/usr/local/lib libsensor_ctrl.a /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.9.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.9.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.9.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_aruco.so.4.9.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.9.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.9.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.9.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.9.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.9.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.9.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.9.0 -lcamera -lcamera-base -lRTIMULib -lrobot -lgpiod -lpthread -lm
